sentences.arabic: سَقَطَ الْوَلَدُ الصَّغِيرُ فِي الشَّارِعِ وَجُرِحَتْ يَدُهُ.
sentences.translation: Mali dječak je pao na ulici i povrijedio ruku.
sentences.translationEn: The little boy fell in the street and his hand was injured.

sentences.translation: Majka je očistila ranu vodom i sapunom.
sentences.translationEn: The mother cleaned the wound with water and soap.

sentences.translation: Stavila je čist zavoj na to mjesto.
sentences.translationEn: She put a clean bandage on the spot.
